title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework built on read, write, edit, and bash operations, with everything beyond that as installable or custom extensions. It works with multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering a lower-cost alternative to frontier models for agent-based coding tasks.
